name: wilson-go
description: UserPromptSubmit hook вЂ” when the user types a bare AN10 fan-out keyword (`go` / `loop` / `лі‘л ¬` / ...), inject an instruction telling Claude to dispatch multiple `Agent` tool calls in a SINGLE message, all with `run_in_background=true`, treating the prior user request as the fan-out task. Sidecar-minimal port of dancinlab/archive-nexus rule AN10 (rules/anima.json, added 2026-04-16) + tool/parallel_dispatch_guard.hexa вЂ” no agent-ledger, no DAG scheduler, no shadow comparator; just trigger detection and additionalContext injection. The model dispatches; the hook only nudges. Match is exact-after-strip+lower so `go to file X` does NOT trigger вЂ” only a bare keyword does. Trigger set: go В· gogo В· г„±г„± В· к°Ђмћђ В· к°Ђм¦€м•„ В· keep В· keep going В· loop В· лЈЁн”„ В· лі‘л ¬ В· лЏ™м‹њ В· л°±к·ёлќјмљґл“њ. Default subagent_type mapping: explorationв†’Explore, planningв†’Plan, generalв†’general-purpose, claude-code/SDK questionsв†’claude-code-guide. Anti-pattern (called out in the injected instruction): launch one Agent, wait for result, launch the next вЂ” sequential dispatch is exactly what AN10 prohibits. Toggle: /sidecar off go. Default ON. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_GO=1.
